note: Removed IFNET import compatibility and OS/DPlane provider aliases from IFNET. Host-interface import remains a DPlane CLI operation that installs/uninstalls Ethernet devices through src/ETHERNET/device.py; IFNET now only keeps logical interface protocols, injected provider types, and runtime snapshots via src/IFNET/interfaces.py.
